stories.title: Tiger Woods — 9 Days to Augusta, Listed in Field, Status Still Uncertain

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods is listed in the Masters field. He hasn't confirmed he'll play.

DUI arrest. Mugshot released. Trump says "won't be playing."

Augusta is 9 days away — and the biggest question in golf has no answer yet.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #TigerWoods

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods: 5-time Masters champion. 27th potential start at Augusta.

He's practicing. He's in the field. He's not saying yes.

The world is watching. April 9 is 9 days away. 🏌️

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #TigerWoods

article.headline: Tiger Woods Is in the Masters Field. He Hasn't Said Yes. Augusta Is 9 Days Away.

stories.title: Valero Texas Open Starts Thursday — Last Masters Berth on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Valero Texas Open starts THURSDAY.

The winner gets the last spot in the Masters field.

Fleetwood. Aberg. Fowler. Spieth. All of them — at TPC San Antonio — for a shot at Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #Masters

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tommy Fleetwood leads Valero Texas Open odds at +1400.

But the real prize isn't the trophy. Win this week and you're on the first tee at Augusta National in 9 days.

No. 3 oldest PGA Tour event. Highest stakes in years. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #PGATour

article.headline: The Last Masters Spot Is on the Line: Valero Texas Open Starts Thursday

stories.title: Masters Countdown — 9 Days: Scheffler Favorite, McIlroy Defending, Tiger In Limbo

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
9 days until the 90th Masters Tournament.

Scheffler +480 (World No. 1, 2-time champ). McIlroy defending (2025 Grand Slam winner). Tiger TBD.

One Valero spot still open. One Augusta chapter yet to be written.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 facts to know:

93 players. Jim Nantz's 38th year at Augusta. Amazon Prime's first broadcast. One spot left for the Valero winner.

Scheffler vs. McIlroy vs. DeChambeau vs. Tiger? — if he plays.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Augusta

article.headline: Masters 2026 Countdown: Scheffler Favored, McIlroy Defending, Tiger Still a Question Mark

stories.title: LPGA Chevron Championship — April 23-26, Kim Enters as Back-to-Back Winner

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Hyo Joo Kim is the hottest player in women's golf right now.

Back-to-back LPGA wins. Two 61s in the same tournament. And the Chevron Championship — the first LPGA major — is coming April 23-26.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #ChevronChampionship

article.headline: LPGA's First Major Is Coming — And Hyo Joo Kim Is Arriving on the Hottest Streak on Tour

stories.title: LIV Golf's Biggest 2026 Changes — 72 Holes, No Cut, New Venues

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf is now 72 holes (up from 54). Still no cut. 57 players per event.

Trump Doral is OUT of the schedule. New Orleans is IN.

LIV's biggest format change since launch — and DeChambeau is on a 2-win hot streak heading into April.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf #Golf

article.headline: LIV Golf Goes 72 Holes: The League's Biggest Format Change Since Launch

stories.title: Fowler and Spieth at Valero — Two Fan Favorites Chasing Augusta Redemption

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Rickie Fowler and Jordan Spieth are both at the Valero Texas Open this week.

Both want a Masters invite. Both have unfinished Augusta business.

Thursday can't come soon enough. #GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #PGATour

stories.title: Gary Woodland's Masters Debut — From Brain Surgery to Augusta National

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Gary Woodland won the Houston Open Sunday — earning his spot at Augusta National.

Brain tumor surgery. PTSD disclosure. Five years of fighting back.

He's going to the Masters. And he's earned every step. 🙏

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #GaryWoodland
